title: Fix format=format parameter bug shadowing Python builtin

acceptanceCriteria.text: Rename the `format` parameter in search handler to avoid shadowing Python builtin `format`
Verify that `detail='full'` returns full content (not compact/truncated)
Add regression test: call search with detail='full', assert full content returned
Run CodeRabbit review - must pass (or create BUG if unfixable)
Commit: fix: BUG-005 rename format parameter to avoid Python builtin shadowing
